title: Retrieval Augmented Fine Tuning (RAFT)

defines.name: RAFT
defines.definition: A training recipe that fine-tunes LLMs to answer questions using relevant retrieved documents while ignoring distractor documents and citing supporting text verbatim.

problem: Existing RAG and fine-tuning approaches do not jointly prepare pretrained LLMs to use retrieved evidence while remaining robust to irrelevant retrieved documents in specialized domains.
